data.name: window_botresponses_artist_blocked
data.comment: Header for the textbox when an artist is blocked

data.name: window_botresponses_fetch_error
data.comment: Header for the textbox when an error occurred while fetching song info

data.name: window_botresponses_header
data.value: Configure the bot responses for the following scenarios:
data.comment: Header for the entire bot response configuration window

data.name: window_botresponses_max_songs
data.comment: Header for the textbox when max amount of songs are reached per suer

data.name: window_botresponses_no_song
data.value: No song has been specified (empty request)
data.comment: Header for the textbox when no song was found

data.name: window_botresponses_song_in_queue
data.comment: Header for the textbox when the song is already in queue

data.name: window_botresponses_song_too_long
data.comment: Header for the textbox when the song is too long

data.name: window_botresponses_success
data.comment: Header for the textbox when the song has been added successfully

data.name: window_blocklist_add
data.comment: Button content for the "Add" button on the blocklist window

data.name: window_blocklist_clear
data.comment: Button content for the "Clear" button on the blocklist window

data.name: window_blocklist_artist
data.comment: Combobox item content for "Artist"

data.name: window_blocklist_user
data.comment: Combobox item content for "User"

data.name: window_blocklist_blocked_artists
data.comment: Label content for blocked artists

data.name: window_blocklist_blocked_users
data.comment: Label content for blocked users

data.name: window_blocklist_delete
data.comment: Contextmenu button content for "Delete"

data.comment: Language name for "German"

data.comment: Language name for "English"

data.comment: Menu content for "Settings"

data.name: menu_support
data.comment: Menu content for "Support Us" (unused)

data.name: menu_file_widget
data.comment: Menu content for "Widget"

data.name: window_settings_appearance_color
data.comment: Label content for "Color"

data.name: window_settings_appearance_theme_dark
data.comment: Toggleswitch content for "Dark Theme"

data.name: window_settings_appearance_theme_light
data.comment: Toggleswitch content for "Light Theme"

data.name: window_settings_config_export
data.comment: Button content for "Export Config"

data.name: window_settings_config_import
data.comment: Button content for "Import Config"

data.name: window_settings_integration_autoconnect
data.comment: Toggleswitch content for "auto connect"

data.name: window_settings_integration_link
data.comment: Button content for "Link"

data.name: window_settings_integration_configure_responses
data.comment: Button content for "Configure Bot Responses & Commands"

data.name: window_settings_integration_nb_watermark
data.comment: Watermark for Nightbot Username (deprecated, unused)

data.name: window_settings_integration_spotify_linked
data.comment: Label content for "Linked account:"

data.name: window_settings_integration_twitch_channel
data.comment: Label content for "Channel to join"

data.name: window_settings_spotify_sr_channel_points
data.comment: Label content for "Channel Points Reward ID"

data.name: window_settings_spotify_sr_clear_queue
data.comment: Toggleswitch content for "Clear queue on startup"

data.name: window_settings_spotify_sr_command_cd
data.comment: Label content for "Command cooldown (seconds)"

data.name: window_settings_spotify_sr_max_length
data.comment: Label content for "Max song length (in minutes)"

data.name: window_settings_spotify_sr_max_req
data.comment: Label content for "Max Requests per user"

data.name: window_settings_spotify_sr_message_logging
data.comment: Checkbox content for "Enable message logging) (unused as of 1.3.9)

data.name: window_settings_spotify_sr_command
data.value: Command for making song requests. (Command + Spotify Link or Artist - Title)
data.comment: Toggleswitch content for "Enable SR (Command)"

data.name: window_settings_spotify_sr_reward
data.comment: Toggleswitch content for "Enable SR (Channel Reward)"

data.name: window_settings_output_add_spaces
data.comment: Checkbox content for "append spaces"

data.name: window_settings_output_directory
data.comment: Label content for "Output Directory"

data.name: window_settings_output_download_album
data.value: Download album cover (only works with API)
data.comment: Toggleswitch content for "Download album cover (only works with API)"

data.name: window_settings_output_format
data.comment: Label content for "Output Format (Text file & Widget)

data.name: window_settings_output_pause_text
data.comment: Toggleswitch content for "Pause Text"

data.name: window_settings_output_pause_watermark
data.value: Custom pause text (blank for empty text file)
data.comment: Watermark content for the pause text textbox

data.name: window_settings_output_split_artist
data.comment: Toggleswitch content for "Split Artist and Title"

data.name: window_settings_output_upload_song_info
data.comment: Toggleswitch content for "Upload song info"

data.comment: (unused)

data.name: window_settings_spotify_use_own_app
data.comment: Toggleswitch content for "Use Own AppID"

data.comment: Toggleswitch content for "autostart with windows"

data.comment: Label content for "Behavior"

data.comment: Button content for "check for updates" (unused)

data.comment: Label content for "Chrome fetch rate (seconds)"

data.comment: MenuItem content for "Patch notes"

data.value: Hide account names and profile pictures
data.comment: ToggleSwitch Content for "Display account names and profile pictures"

data.comment: ToggleSwitch content for "open queue window on startup"

data.name: window_settings_integration_auto_announce
data.value: Automatically announce song to chat (uses the !song response)
data.comment: TollgeSwitch content for "Automatically Announce Song To Chat"

data.name: window_settings_integration_only_when_live
data.value: Limit Twitch activity to only work when stream is live (needs Twitch login)
data.comment: ToggleSwitch content for "Limit Twitch activity to only work when stream is live (needs Twitch login)"

data.name: window_settings_integration_manage_rewards
data.comment: Button content for "Manage Rewards"

data.name: window_settings_integration_max_sr_user
data.value: Max SR / User (based on user level)

data.name: window_settings_integration_refund_when
data.comment: Label content for "Refund when"

data.comment: Checkbox content for "User level is too low"

data.value: Song is not available in region

data.name: window_settings_integration_refund_song_added
data.value: Song has been added to the queue

data.comment: TabControl header content for "Accoutns"

data.comment: TabControl header content for "Rewards"

data.name: window_blocklist_title

data.name: window_settings_system_privacy_header
data.comment: The word "Privacy"

data.name: window_settings_webserver_auto_start
data.comment: Toggleswitch content for "Automatically start the web server"

data.name: window_settings_config_reset
data.comment: Button content for "Reset Config"

data.name: window_settings_webserver_stop
data.comment: Button content for "Stop Web Server"

data.name: window_settings_config_beta_updates
data.comment: Toggleswitch Content for "get beta updates"

data.name: window_main_link_spotify
data.value: Please link your Spotify account. Settings -> Spotify
data.comment: Textblock content for "Please link your Spotify account Settings -> Spotify"

data.name: common_save
data.comment: The word "Save" as in to save in file

data.name: common_upload
data.comment: The word "Upload" as in to upload to the server

data.name: common_name
data.comment: The word "Name" as in name of the song (Artist + Title)

data.name: common_time
data.comment: The word "Time" as in when the song was played (history)

data.name: window_settings_twitch_create_reward
data.comment: Button content for "Create New Reward"

data.name: window_botresponses_mod_skip
data.value: Broadcaster / Moderator / Requester skipped the song
data.comment: Header for the textbox when the Broadcaster / Mod / Requester skipped the song

data.name: window_botresponses_pos
data.comment: Header for the textbox when the !pos command has been executed

data.name: window_botresponses_next
data.comment: Header for the textbox when !next hast been executed

data.name: window_botresponses_title
data.comment: Window Title for the Bot Responses and Commands window

data.name: window_botresponses_tab_responses
data.comment: Tabcontrol Header for "Responses" (Bot response window)

data.name: window_botresponses_tab_commands
data.comment: TabControl Header for "Commands" (Bot Responses Window)

data.name: window_botresponses_vote_skip
data.value: User voted to skip the current song
data.comment: Header for the textbox when the !voteskip command has been executed

data.name: window_settings_spotify_reward_sr
data.comment: Label content for "Reward for Song Request"

data.name: window_settings_spotify_sr_moved_to_bot_config
data.comment: Label that states "!ssr command moved to bot config"@MutedRule(PunctuationLead)

data.name: window_settings_integration_min_user_level
data.value: Minimum user level required for SR
data.comment: Label for "Minum user level required for SR"

data.name: window_settings_integration_twitch_account
data.comment: Label for "Twitch Account" (without colon)

data.name: window_settings_twitch_logout
data.comment: The word logout as in "log out of twitch"

data.name: window_settings_integration_refund_disclaimer
data.value: In order to be able to refund points, the reward has to be created through Songify. Select a reward that is manageable or create a new one.
data.comment: Short disclaimer that hides Refund Conditions if the Reward is not managaeable by Songify.

data.name: dialog_bot_account
data.comment: Messagebox Header that says "Bot Account"

data.name: dialog_use_as_bot_account
data.value: Successfully linked to {account}. Would you also like to use this account as the chat bot?
data.comment: Text that displays after linking to twitch that asks if this accoutn should also be used as the bot account

data.name: dialog_yes
data.comment: The word "Yes" on a messagebox as in Yes/Confirm/Affirmative

data.name: dialog_no
data.comment: The word "No" in a MessageBox Button as in No/Negaitve/Decline

data.name: window_settings_integration_stream_not_live_notification
data.comment: Header for the ToggleSwtich to send a message to chat if the stream is not live and a command has been used

data.name: window_botresponses_song
data.comment: Label content "Response for !song command"

data.name: window_botresponses_refund
data.value: Response when channel points have been refunded. (empty for no response)
data.comment: Title for the text field

data.name: window_settings_system_language
data.comment: Label that says "Language"

data.name: window_botresponses_cmd_remove
data.value: Removes the latest song request of the user.

data.name: window_botresponses_song_like
data.comment: Lable for the !songlike command

data.name: window_botresponses_cmd_songlike
data.value: Adds the current song to the playlist selected in Spotify config.
data.comment: Comman description

data.name: window_settings_spotify_sr_userlevel_command
data.value: Allowed user levels for SR command

data.name: window_settings_spotify_sr_userlevel_reward
data.value: Allowed user levels for SR reward

data.name: window_settings_spotify_songlike_tooltip
data.value: The playlist that songs get added when using the !songlike command or with the option to automatically add songs to the playlist.

data.name: window_settings_spotify_add_to_playlist
data.value: Add all song requests to the playlist

data.name: window_botresponses_song_not_in_playlist
data.value: Response when the song was not found in the allowed songs playlist
data.comment: Response when the song was not found in the allowed songs playlist

data.name: window_botresponses_remove
data.comment: Response for !remove

data.name: language_pl
data.comment: Language name for "Polish"

data.name: language_pt
data.comment: Language name for "Portuguese"

data.name: window_settings_spotify_only_allow_from_playlist
data.value: Allow only songs from this playlist (SR)

data.name: window_botresponses_explicit_songs
data.value: Response when an explicit song has been requested and 'block explicit songs' is turned on

data.name: language_it
data.comment: Language name for "Italian"

data.name: window_settings_system_use_default_browser
data.comment: Use Default Web Browser

data.name: window_botresponses_command_on_cooldown
data.value: Response when the sr command is on cooldown
data.comment: Command on Cooldown Response

data.name: window_botresponses_no_track_found
data.value: Response when no track was found
data.comment: No Track Found response

data.name: window_botresponses_cmd_vol
data.value: Returns the current volume or sets it. '!vol [0-100]'

data.name: language_pt_br
data.comment: Language name for "Brazilian Portuguese"

data.name: window_settings_output_apply_to_split_files
data.comment: Append spaves to split files too

data.name: window_settings_rewards_click_reminder
data.value: Click here after selecting the reward

data.name: window_botresponses_cmd_queue_return
data.value: Returns the first 5 songs of the current playback queue

data.name: window_botresponses_command_on_user_cooldown
data.value: Response when the User is on cooldown (per user sr command cooldown)

data.name: window_settings_ytm_disclaimer
data.value: Compare the codes between Songify and the YouTube Music Desktop player. Only accept the integration request if the codes match!

data.name: window_main_widget_disclaimer
data.value: The widget only works if "Upload Song Info" is enabled. You can find this option under Settings -> Output. Do you want to activate it now?

data.name: common_connected
data.comment: The word "Connected"

data.name: common_disconnected
data.comment: The word "Disconnected"

data.name: window_queue_clear_disclaimer
data.value: Do you really want to clear the queue?

data.name: common_warning
data.comment: The word "Warning"

data.name: common_song
data.comment: The word "Song"

data.name: common_track_added
data.value: Track has been added to the queue.

data.name: common_fill_client_id_secret
data.value: Please enter the Spotify client ID and Secret

data.name: window_botresponses_user_level_too_low_command
data.value: Userlevel is too low for !ssr command

data.name: window_botresponses_user_level_too_low_reward
data.value: Userlevel is too low for song request reward

data.name: common_columns
data.comment: The word "Columns"

data.name: window_botresponses_cmd_queue
data.value: Returns the first 5 songs of the current playback queue

data.name: param_user_description
data.value: The user who triggered the command or channel reward

data.name: param_requester_description
data.value: The requester of the current song

data.name: param_conditional_text_description
data.value: The text inside of '{{' and '}}' will only be posted if the current song is a song request

data.name: param_artist_description
data.value: Artists for the current song or song request

data.name: param_single_artist_description
data.value: Main artist for the current song or song request

data.name: param_error_message_description
data.value: Error message if an error occurs

data.name: param_song_list_description
data.value: For !pos command only, creates a list of songs that the user has in the queue with their position

data.name: param_votes_description
data.value: Number of votes for voteskip votes/total

data.name: param_cooldown_description
data.value: The cooldown in seconds (for global cd and user cd)

data.name: common_copied
data.comment: The word "Copied"

data.name: language_be
data.comment: Language name for "Belarusian"

data.name: param_time_to_play_description
data.value: The time in mm:ss when the song request will play.

data.name: window_botresponses_cmd_bansong
data.value: Adds the current song to the blocklist and skips it.

data.name: window_settings_spotify_sr_add_only_to_playlist
data.value: Add requests only to the selected playlist

data.name: param_refund_reason_description
data.value: The reason why the redemption got refunded.

data.name: language_nl
data.comment: Language name for "Dutch"

data.name: window_botresponses_cmd_togglesr
data.value: Enable / Disable Song Requests (disables them in App and also tries to pause the Reward)

data.name: menu_help_app_folder
data.comment: Menu content for "Songify Folder"

data.name: menu_file_check_for_updates
data.comment: Menu content for "Check For Updates

data.name: menu_view_user_list
data.comment: Menu content for "User List"

data.name: menu_view_webserver_url
data.comment: Menu content for "Web Server URL"

data.name: window_settings_integration_stream_shared_chat
data.value: Listen to chat commands from shared chat

data.name: common_delete
data.comment: Context: Menu item / button label for delete action (queue row, history, blocklist).

data.name: common_close
data.comment: Context: Button to close a dialog or window (e.g. blocklist artist dialog).

data.name: common_add
data.comment: Context: Button label to add an item (e.g. add artist/song/user in blocklist).

data.name: common_cancel
data.comment: Context: Button to cancel and close a dialog without applying (e.g. cloud import).

data.name: common_artist
data.comment: Context: Column header / label for artist name (queue, blocklist, output format).

data.name: common_title
data.comment: Context: Column header / label for song or track title.

data.name: common_id
data.comment: Context: Column header for ID field (e.g. artist ID in blocklist resolve dialog).

data.name: common_column_number
data.comment: Context: Column header for row number / index in blocklist dialogs.

data.name: common_beta
data.comment: Context: Label shown on main window when running a beta build.

data.name: common_close_x
data.comment: Context: Close button symbol (e.g. in flyouts, account panel).

data.name: window_queue_tab_queue
data.comment: Context: Tab header in Queue window for the main queue list.

data.name: window_queue_tab_requestlist
data.comment: Context: Tab header in Queue window for the request list.

data.name: window_queue_tab_skiplist
data.comment: Context: Tab header in Queue window for the skip list.

data.name: window_queue_skip_song
data.comment: Context: Tooltip on button in queue row to skip the current song.

data.name: window_queue_add_to_favorite_playlist
data.comment: Context: Tooltip on button in queue row to add song to favorites.

data.name: window_queue_show_hide_spotify_controls
data.comment: Context: Tooltip on button to toggle Spotify controls visibility.

data.name: window_queue_track_id
data.comment: Context: Column header in Queue window requestlist tab.

data.name: window_queue_played
data.comment: Context: Column header in Queue window for when the song was played.

data.name: window_createreward_user_input_required
data.comment: Context: Checkbox label in Create Custom Reward dialog (Twitch reward setting).

data.name: window_console_detach_attach
data.comment: Context: Tooltip on button to detach or re-attach the console window.

data.name: window_console_clear
data.comment: Context: Tooltip on button to clear the console log.

data.name: window_console_log
data.comment: Context: Tab or toggle label for log view in Console window.

data.name: window_console_api_metrics
data.comment: Context: Tab or section label for API metrics in Console window.

data.name: window_console_graph
data.comment: Context: Button or tab label for graph view in Console window.

data.name: window_console_endpoint
data.comment: Context: Column header in Console API metrics (API endpoint path).

data.name: window_console_requests_per_min
data.comment: Context: Column header / axis label in Console (request rate).

data.name: window_console_metrics
data.comment: Context: Button or section label for metrics view in Console window.

data.name: window_blocklist_select_artist
data.comment: Context: Dialog title when multiple artists match search (choose one to block).

data.name: window_blocklist_multiple_artists_match
data.value: Multiple artists matched your search. Select one to block.
data.comment: Context: Message in blocklist dialog when search returns multiple artists.

data.name: window_blocklist_block_selected
data.comment: Context: Button in blocklist artist-resolve dialog to block selected artist(s).

data.name: window_blocklist_resolve_artist_id
data.comment: Context: Dialog title for resolving ambiguous artist search to an ID.

data.name: window_blocklist_skip
data.comment: Context: Button in blocklist resolve dialog to skip / not block any.

data.name: window_blocklist_use_selected
data.comment: Context: Button in blocklist resolve dialog to use the selected artist.

data.name: window_blocklist_description
data.value: Block artists, songs, or users from being requested. Artist and Songs only work for Spotify!
data.comment: Context: Description text at top of Blocklist window explaining the feature.

data.name: window_blocklist_refresh_ids
data.comment: Context: Button in Blocklist Artists tab to refresh Spotify artist IDs.

data.name: window_blocklist_remove_all
data.comment: Context: Button to remove all entries in a blocklist tab (artists/songs/users).

data.name: window_blocklist_tab_artists
data.comment: Context: Tab header in Blocklist window for blocked artists.

data.name: window_blocklist_tab_songs
data.comment: Context: Tab header in Blocklist window for blocked songs.

data.name: window_blocklist_tab_users
data.comment: Context: Tab header in Blocklist window for blocked users.

data.name: window_blocklist_refresh_user_ids
data.comment: Context: Button in Blocklist Users tab to refresh Twitch user IDs.

data.name: window_blocklist_search_multi_select
data.value: The search returned more than one artist. Select one or more to block.
data.comment: Context: Message in blocklist resolve dialog (multi-select hint).

data.name: window_blocklist_add_selected
data.comment: Context: Button in blocklist resolve dialog to add selected artist(s) to blocklist.

data.name: window_settings_getting_ready
data.comment: Context: Loading message shown in Settings when data is being fetched.

data.name: window_settings_enable_debug_logging
data.comment: Context: Checkbox in Settings System tab to enable debug logs.

data.name: window_settings_songify_api_token
data.comment: Context: Label for Songify API token field in Settings.

data.name: window_settings_copy_to_clipboard
data.comment: Context: Tooltip on button that copies something to clipboard (e.g. path, URL).

data.name: window_settings_oauth_token_tooltip
data.value: Click here to get the oAuth token.

data.name: window_settings_offline_cancelled_tooltip
data.value: Enabling this will send a message to chat if an action has been cancelled due to the stream being offline.

data.name: window_settings_shared_chat_tooltip
data.value: This options enables the listening to shared chat, allowing commands to be sent from shared chats.

data.name: window_settings_refund_conditions_info
data.value: To be able to refund points the Reward has to be created through Songify!

data.name: window_settings_poll_setup_hint
data.value: Setup the poll system for skip votes

data.name: window_settings_bits_keyword_hint
data.value: Bits Keyword (SR will only get triggered if that keyword is in the bits message)

data.name: window_settings_edit_commands_hint
data.value: Edit commands by clicking on the trigger

data.name: window_settings_right_click_command_hint
data.value: Right-click on a command to adjust who can use it.

data.name: window_settings_spotify_bypass_fetch_gate_tooltip
data.value: When enabled, Songify fetches Spotify playback even when you are not live and Test Mode is off. May increase Spotify API usage and rate-limit risk.

data.name: window_settings_credentials_disclaimer
data.value: We do not store Twitch and Spotify credentials! In case of restoring a cloud backup you have to re-login with Twitch and Spotify

data.name: window_main_title
data.comment: Context: Main application window title.

data.name: window_main_support_kofi
data.comment: Context: Label/link in main window for Ko-Fi support (may be overridden by cta_support per language).

data.name: menu_faq
data.comment: Context: Main menu item that opens FAQ.

data.name: menu_github
data.comment: Context: Main menu item that opens GitHub repository.

data.name: menu_discord
data.comment: Context: Main menu item that opens Discord.

data.name: menu_twitch
data.comment: Context: Main menu header for Twitch submenu (login, check status, etc.).

data.name: menu_twitch_connect_tooltip
data.comment: Context: Tooltip on Twitch menu or connect button.

data.name: menu_notifications
data.comment: Context: Main menu header for notifications flyout.

data.name: common_mark_all_read
data.comment: Context: Tooltip on button to mark all notifications as read.

data.name: window_main_pubsub_disabled
data.value: PubSub has been disabled due to bugs
data.comment: Context: Label in main window when PubSub is disabled.

data.name: window_main_copyright
data.comment: Context: Copyright line in main window or about area.

data.name: window_about_title
data.comment: Context: About window title.

data.name: window_about_third_party
data.comment: Context: Button or section header in About window for third-party libs.

data.name: window_about_licenses
data.comment: Context: Section title in About window for licenses.

data.name: window_about_libraries_intro
data.value: Songify Slim makes use of the following open-source libraries.
data.comment: Context: Intro paragraph in About window before library list.

data.name: window_about_license_notice
data.value: All listed libraries remain the property of their respective authors and are used in accordance with their licenses.
data.comment: Context: Legal notice in About window about library ownership.

data.name: window_about_license_label
data.comment: Context: Label before license name for each library in About window.

data.name: window_about_gpl_notice
data.value: This Project is a free time project and licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0.
data.comment: Context: GPL notice in About window.

data.name: window_about_discord_invite
data.value: If you want to support this project feel free to hang out with us on Discord!
data.comment: Context: Text in About window inviting users to Discord.

data.name: window_about_thank_you
data.comment: Context: Thank-you label in About window (e.g. next to heart icon).

data.name: window_cloudimport_intro
data.value: You're about to import settings from the cloud.

data.name: window_manualtwitch_instructions
data.value: To login with Twitch follow the instructions below:

data.name: window_manualtwitch_step1
data.value: 1) Click this button to open the Twitch Login page:

data.name: window_manualtwitch_step2
data.value: 2) Paste the code you received from the website:

data.name: window_manualtwitch_step3
data.value: 3) Click this button to link your account with Songify:

data.name: uc_command_allowed_users
data.comment: Context: Menu header in command editor for user-level restrictions.

data.name: uc_command_all
data.comment: Context: Menu item in command editor meaning all users can use the command.

data.name: uc_command_add_users
data.comment: Context: Menu item in command editor to add allowed users.

data.name: uc_command_add_aliases
data.comment: Context: Menu item in command editor to add command aliases.

data.name: uc_command_announcement
data.comment: Context: Menu header in command editor for announcement options.

data.name: uc_command_announce
data.comment: Context: Menu item in command editor to announce the command in chat.

data.name: uc_command_color
data.comment: Context: Menu header in command editor for chat message color.

data.name: uc_command_color_blue
data.comment: Context: Color option in command editor (chat message color).

data.name: uc_command_color_green
data.comment: Context: Color option in command editor (chat message color).

data.name: uc_command_color_orange
data.comment: Context: Color option in command editor (chat message color).

data.name: uc_command_color_purple
data.comment: Context: Color option in command editor (chat message color).

data.name: uc_command_color_primary
data.comment: Context: Color option in command editor (theme primary; chat message color).

data.name: uc_reward_created_by_songify
data.comment: Context: Tooltip on Twitch reward tile when reward was created via Songify.

data.name: uc_reward_song_request
data.comment: Context: ComboBox item in reward type selector (Twitch reward type).

data.name: uc_reward_skip_song
data.comment: Context: ComboBox item in reward type selector (Twitch reward type).

data.name: uc_reward_start_skip_poll
data.comment: Context: ComboBox item in reward type selector (Twitch reward type).

data.name: uc_psa_mark_as_read
data.comment: Context: Tooltip on PSA/notification item to mark it as read.

data.name: uc_reward_managed_by_songify
data.comment: Context: Tooltip on reward item indicating it can be managed in Songify app.

data.name: common_browse
data.comment: Context: Button label to open folder/file browser (e.g. output directory in Settings).

data.name: common_help
data.comment: Context: Help button label or tooltip trigger (e.g. next to API token, oAuth).

data.name: window_settings_tab_spotify
data.comment: Context: Tab header in Settings for Spotify integration.

data.name: window_settings_tab_youtube
data.comment: Context: Tab header in Settings for YouTube integration.

data.name: window_settings_tab_songrequest
data.comment: Context: Tab header in Settings for song request / commands configuration.

data.name: window_settings_only_add_to_playlist
data.value: Only add requests to the selected playlist
data.comment: Context: Toggle in Settings Song Request section (Spotify playlist behavior).

data.name: window_settings_tab_polls
data.comment: Context: Tab header in Settings for skip-vote poll configuration.

data.name: window_settings_time_placeholder
data.comment: Context: Placeholder for time display (e.g. poll duration, queue time).

data.name: window_responseparams_title
data.comment: Context: Window title for the response parameters / variables dialog.
